name: Triple Layer Chocolate Fudge
description: Rich, moist chocolate sponge layers with deep cocoa frosting, topped with chocolate shavings and a dark ganache drip.

name: Navy & Gold Traditional Ruracio Cake
description: A majestic three-tier traditional wedding cake featuring intricate navy and orange geometric patterns with gold detailing.

name: H.E. Uhuru Kenyatta Birthday Cake
description: Large square vanilla buttercream cake featuring a high-definition edible print and custom gold acrylic topper.

name: Traditional Clay Pot (Nyungu) Cake
description: A masterpiece sculpted cake shaped like a traditional clay pot, set on a patterned base with pampas grass and gold accents.

name: Kid Genius Education Cake
description: A fun, educational-themed white cake featuring fondant pencils, a graduation cap, and 'ABC' chalkboard graphics.

name: Kibali Football Birthday Cake
description: White buttercream cake with a green 'grass' top, chocolate drip, and custom soccer-themed toppers.

name: Spiderman Two-Tier Milestone Cake
description: A vibrant two-tier superhero cake featuring city skyline silhouettes, spiderweb patterns, and custom character toppers.

name: Taniah's 3rd Birthday Theme Cake
description: White horizontally-ridged buttercream cake decorated with custom cardstock character toppers, a rainbow arc, edible prints, and pink sugar pearls.
